      ```lean
            (∫ x : NPointDomain d n,
                A (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x
                  ((π * Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩) k)) * φ x)
              =
             ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
                A (BHW.realEmbed
                  (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) * ψ u := by
        let ψ : SchwartzNPoint d n :=
          BHW.permuteSchwartz (d := d) π.symm φ
        have hψ_apply :
            ∀ u,
              ψ u =
                φ (BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph d n π u) := by
          intro u
          simp [ψ, BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph]
        have hψ_comp :
            HasCompactSupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) :=
          BHW.permuteSchwartz_hasCompactSupport
            (d := d) π.symm φ hφ_comp
        have hψ_supp :
            tsupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) ⊆
              BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi := by
          intro u hu
          have hpre :
              (((LinearEquiv.funCongrLeft ℝ (Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ) π.symm).toContinuousLinearEquiv :
                  NPointDomain d n ≃L[ℝ] NPointDomain d n).toHomeomorph u) ∈
                tsupport (φ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) := by
            rw [BHW.tsupport_permuteSchwartz (d := d) π.symm φ] at hu
            exact hu
          have hHu :
              BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph d n π u ∈
                tsupport (φ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) := by
            simpa [BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph] using hpre
          rcases hφ_supp hHu with ⟨v, hv, hv_eq⟩
          have hvu : v = u :=
            (BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph d n π).injective hv_eq
          simpa [hvu] using hv
        have hleft_pullback :
            (∫ x : NPointDomain d n,
                A (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (π k)) * φ x)
              =
             ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
                A (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψ u := by
          let h : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ := fun x =>
            A (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (π k)) * φ x
          have hp :=
            (BHW.integral_perm_eq_self (d := d) (n := n) π.symm h).symm
          have harg : ∀ x : NPointDomain d n,
              (fun k => BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (π.symm k)) (π k)) =
                BHW.realEmbed x := by
            intro x; ext k μ; simp [BHW.realEmbed]
          simpa [h, ψ, BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph, harg] using hp
        have hright_pullback :
            (∫ x : NPointDomain d n,
                A (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x
                  ((π * Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩) k)) * φ x)
              =
             ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
                A (BHW.realEmbed
                  (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) * ψ u := by
          let τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) := Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩
          let h : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ := fun x =>
            A (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x ((π * τ) k)) * φ x
          have hp :=
            (BHW.integral_perm_eq_self (d := d) (n := n) π.symm h).symm
          have harg : ∀ x : NPointDomain d n,
              (fun k => BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (π.symm k)) (π (τ k))) =
                BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (τ k)) := by
            intro x; ext k μ; simp [BHW.realEmbed]
          simpa [h, ψ, τ, BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph, harg,
            Equiv.Perm.mul_apply] using hp
        exact ⟨ψ, hψ_comp, hψ_supp, hψ_apply,
          hleft_pullback, hright_pullback⟩

      structure BHW.Figure24LocalChartInput
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
          (x0 : NPointDomain d n) : Prop where
        V_open : IsOpen V
        V_sourcePatch :
          V ⊆ BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi
        V_jost : ∀ x, x ∈ V -> x ∈ BHW.JostSet d n
        V_ET :
          ∀ x, x ∈ V -> BHW.realEmbed x ∈ BHW.ExtendedTube d n
        V_swapET :
          ∀ x, x ∈ V ->
            BHW.realEmbed
              (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k)) ∈
              BHW.ExtendedTube d n
        V_ordered :
          ∀ x, x ∈ V ->
            x ∈ EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n) 1
        V_swap_ordered :
          ∀ x, x ∈ V ->
            (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k)) ∈
              EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n)
                (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩)
        V_adjLift_ET :
          let τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
            Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩
          ∀ x, x ∈ V ->
            ∀ t,
              BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift
                (d := d) (n := n) hd τ x t ∈
              BHW.ExtendedTube d n
        V_orientedPath_closure :
          ∀ x ∈ closure V,
            BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x
        x0_mem : x0 ∈ V

      /-
      ARCHIVED CIRCULAR TRANSCRIPT, DO NOT PORT.

      The theorem body below instantiates
      `BHW.os45_adjacent_commonBoundaryEnvelope` and the oriented branch-germ
      suppliers.  That is now rejected: the common-boundary envelope is
      downstream of
      `BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq`, the oriented adjacent `S'_n`
      seed/path package, and the branch-local oriented source germs.  The
      active proof of
      `BHW.os45Figure24_sourcePatch_pairing_eq_swappedSourcePatch_of_OSI45`
      must instead be the direct OS I §4.5 / BHW-Jost compact producer
      documented below:

        checked Wick compact branch-difference zero
          -> OS45SourcePatchBHWJostPairData
          -> distributional zero of P.difference on the selected source patch
          -> checked real-source difference / compact-pairing algebra
          -> source-patch compact branch equality.

      This archived body is retained only to record which common-boundary
      arguments were removed from the active route.
      -/

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24_sourcePatch_pairing_eq_swappedSourcePatch_of_OSI45
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
          (hV_open : IsOpen V)
          (hV_jost : ∀ x, x ∈ V -> x ∈ BHW.JostSet d n)
          (hV_ET :
            ∀ x, x ∈ V -> BHW.realEmbed x ∈ BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
          (hV_swapET :
            ∀ x, x ∈ V ->
              BHW.realEmbed
                (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k)) ∈
                BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
          (hV_ordered :
            ∀ x, x ∈ V ->
              x ∈ EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n) 1)
          (hV_swap_ordered :
            ∀ x, x ∈ V ->
              (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k)) ∈
                EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n)
                  (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩))
          (hV_adjLift_ET :
            let τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
              Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩
            ∀ x, x ∈ V ->
              ∀ t,
                BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift
                  (d := d) (n := n) hd τ x t ∈
                BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
          (hV_sourcePatch :
            V ⊆ BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi)
          {x0 : NPointDomain d n}
          (hx0V : x0 ∈ V)
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt hd OS lgc n i hi V x0)
          (hV_orientedPath_closure :
            ∀ x ∈ closure hChart.V0,
              BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x)
          (ψ : SchwartzNPoint d n)
          (hψ_comp :
            HasCompactSupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ))
          (hψ_supp :
            tsupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) ⊆ hChart.V0) :
          ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψ u
            =
          ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) *
                ψ u := by
        classical
        let τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
          Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩
        -- Step 1: the checked OS45 Euclidean edge theorem gives compact
        -- vanishing of the Wick-side branch difference on the selected chart
        -- patch.  This is the only use of Euclidean symmetry here.
        have hwick_pairing_zero_all :
            ∀ (χ : SchwartzNPoint d n),
              HasCompactSupport (χ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) ->
              tsupport (χ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) ⊆ hChart.V0 ->
              ∫ x : NPointDomain d n,
                  (bvt_F OS lgc n (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (τ k))) -
                    bvt_F OS lgc n (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k))) *
                    χ x = 0 := by
          intro χ hχ_comp hχ_supp
          have hwick_eq :
              ∫ x : NPointDomain d n,
                  bvt_F OS lgc n (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (τ k))) *
                    χ x
                =
              ∫ x : NPointDomain d n,
                  bvt_F OS lgc n (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) *
                    χ x := by
            exact
              os45_adjacent_euclideanEdge_pairing_eq_on_timeSector
                (d := d) OS lgc n i hi hChart.V0
                (fun x hx => hV_jost x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
                (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (fun x hx => hV_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
                (by
                  intro x hx
                  simpa [τ, Equiv.swap_inv, one_mul] using
                    hV_swap_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
                χ hχ_supp
          have hleft_int :
              Integrable
                (fun x : NPointDomain d n =>
                  bvt_F OS lgc n
                    (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (τ k))) * χ x) :=
            (BHW.integrable_pairings_of_os45_adjacent_euclideanEdge_on_timeSector
              (d := d) OS lgc n i hi hChart.V0
              (fun x hx => hV_jost x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
              (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
              (fun x hx => hV_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
              (by
                intro x hx
                simpa [τ, Equiv.swap_inv, one_mul] using
                  hV_swap_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
              χ hχ_comp hχ_supp).1
          have hright_int :
              Integrable
                (fun x : NPointDomain d n =>
                  bvt_F OS lgc n
                    (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) * χ x) :=
            (BHW.integrable_pairings_of_os45_adjacent_euclideanEdge_on_timeSector
              (d := d) OS lgc n i hi hChart.V0
              (fun x hx => hV_jost x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
              (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
              (fun x hx => hV_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
              (by
                intro x hx
                simpa [τ, Equiv.swap_inv, one_mul] using
                  hV_swap_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
              χ hχ_comp hχ_supp).2
          -- Rewrite equality of the two compact Wick pairings as vanishing
          -- of the paired Wick branch difference.  The integrability facts
          -- are the standard compact-support/continuous-branch estimates for
          -- the two Wick traces.
          exact
            BHW.integral_wickBranchDifference_mul_eq_zero_of_pairing_eq
              (d := d) OS lgc n τ χ hleft_int hright_int hwick_eq
        -- Step 2: build the genuine OS45 common-boundary envelope.  Its
        -- trace formulas identify one holomorphic chart function `Hc` with
        -- the Wick branch difference on the Wick trace and with the real
        -- source PET-overlap branch difference on the real trace.
        rcases
          BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_sourceEnvironment
            (d := d) hd n i hi with
          ⟨Ufig, hUfig_open, hSourcePatch_closure, hUfig_source⟩
        have hV0_sub_sourcePatch :
            hChart.V0 ⊆
              BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi := by
          intro x hx
          exact hV_sourcePatch (hChart.V0_sub hx)
        have hV0_closure_sub_Ufig :
            closure hChart.V0 ⊆ Ufig := by
          intro x hx
          exact hSourcePatch_closure
            (closure_mono hV0_sub_sourcePatch hx)
        obtain
          ⟨Uc, Hc, hUc_open, hUc_conn, hHc_holo,
            hwick_mem_c, hreal_mem_c, hwick_trace_c, hreal_trace_c⟩ :=
          BHW.os45_adjacent_commonBoundaryEnvelope
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hChart.V0
            (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
            hChart.V0_open
            hChart.V0_connected
            ⟨x0, hChart.x0_mem⟩
            (fun x hx => hV_jost x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
            (fun x hx => hV_ET x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
            (fun x hx => hV_swapET x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
            (fun x hx => hV_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
            (fun x hx => by
              simpa [τ, Equiv.swap_inv, one_mul] using
                hV_swap_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_wickTrace_mem hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_realTrace_mem hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_geometry hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_swappedGeometry hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_precompact hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_horizontal_id hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_horizontal_swap hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_ordered_closure hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_swap_ordered_closure hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_horizontal_id_closure hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_horizontal_swap_closure hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45BranchHorizontalOrientedSourceGermAt_of_figure24_id
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi Ufig hChart.V0
              hUfig_open hUfig_source
              (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_ordered_closure
                hd OS lgc n i hi V x0 hChart)
              hV0_closure_sub_Ufig)
            (BHW.os45BranchHorizontalOrientedSourceGermAt_of_figure24_adjacent
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi Ufig hChart.V0
              hUfig_open hChart.V0_open ⟨x0, hChart.x0_mem⟩
              hChart.V0_connected hV0_sub_sourcePatch
              hUfig_source
              (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_ordered_closure
                hd OS lgc n i hi V x0 hChart)
              (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_swap_ordered_closure
                hd OS lgc n i hi V x0 hChart)
              hV_orientedPath_closure
              hV0_closure_sub_Ufig)
        -- Step 3: convert compact Wick-side vanishing into pointwise
        -- vanishing of `Hc` on the Wick real section, then apply the totally
        -- real identity theorem on the connected common chart.
        have hHc_zero_wick :
            ∀ x ∈ hChart.V0,
              Hc (BHW.os45CommonChartCLE (d := d) (n := n)
                    (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                    (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k))) = 0 := by
          exact
            BHW.os45CommonBoundary_wickTrace_zero_of_compactPairing_zero
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hChart.V0
              (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) Uc Hc
              hChart.V0_open hHc_holo hwick_mem_c hwick_trace_c
              hwick_pairing_zero_all
        have hHc_zero :
            ∀ z ∈ Uc, Hc z = 0 :=
          BHW.os45CommonBoundary_identity_of_wickTrace_zero
            (d := d) hd n hChart.V0 Uc Hc
            hChart.V0_open ⟨x0, hChart.x0_mem⟩
            hUc_open hUc_conn hHc_holo
            hwick_mem_c hHc_zero_wick
        -- Step 4: read the zero statement on the real trace and integrate.
        refine MeasureTheory.integral_congr_ae
          (Filter.Eventually.of_forall ?_)
        intro x
        by_cases hx : x ∈ hChart.V0
        · have hreal_zero :
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (τ k))) -
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (BHW.realEmbed x) = 0 := by
            have hz :=
              hHc_zero
                (BHW.os45CommonChartCLE (d := d) (n := n)
                  (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) (BHW.realEmbed x))
                (hreal_mem_c x hx)
            simpa [hreal_trace_c x hx, τ] using hz
          exact by
            have hbranch_eq :=
              sub_eq_zero.mp hreal_zero
            calc
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (BHW.realEmbed x) * ψ x
                  =
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (τ k))) * ψ x := by
                  rw [hbranch_eq]
        · have hψx : ψ x = 0 := by
            exact
              (notMem_tsupport_iff_eventuallyEq.mp
                (fun hxSupp => hx (hψ_supp hxSupp))).self_of_nhds
          simp [hψx, τ]

      theorem BHW.os45CanonicalSourcePatch_extendF_eq_local
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
          (hV_open : IsOpen V)
          (hV_jost : ∀ x, x ∈ V -> x ∈ BHW.JostSet d n)
          (hV_ET :
            ∀ x, x ∈ V -> BHW.realEmbed x ∈ BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
          (hV_swapET :
            ∀ x, x ∈ V ->
              BHW.realEmbed
                (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k)) ∈
                BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
          (hV_ordered :
            ∀ x, x ∈ V ->
              x ∈ EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n) 1)
          (hV_swap_ordered :
            ∀ x, x ∈ V ->
              (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k)) ∈
                EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n)
                  (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩))
          (hV_adjLift_ET :
            let τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
              Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩
            ∀ x, x ∈ V ->
              ∀ t,
                BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift
                  (d := d) (n := n) hd τ x t ∈
                BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
          (hV_sourcePatch :
            V ⊆ BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi)
          {x0 : NPointDomain d n}
          (hx0V : x0 ∈ V)
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt hd OS lgc n i hi V x0)
          (hV_orientedPath_closure :
            ∀ x ∈ closure hChart.V0,
              BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x)
          (ψ : SchwartzNPoint d n)
          (hψ_comp :
            HasCompactSupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ))
          (hψ_supp :
            tsupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) ⊆ hChart.V0) :
          ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψ u
            =
          ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) *
                ψ u := by
        exact
          BHW.os45Figure24_sourcePatch_pairing_eq_swappedSourcePatch_of_OSI45
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_open hV_jost
            hV_ET hV_swapET hV_ordered hV_swap_ordered
            hV_adjLift_ET hV_sourcePatch hx0V hChart hV_orientedPath_closure
            ψ hψ_comp hψ_supp

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_compactSupport_chartPartition
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (ψ : SchwartzNPoint d n)
          (hψ_comp :
            HasCompactSupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ))
          (hψ_supp :
            tsupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) ⊆
              BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi) :
          ∃ (A : Type) (_ : Fintype A)
            (ψa : A -> SchwartzNPoint d n)
            (Va : A -> Set (NPointDomain d n))
            (x0a : A -> NPointDomain d n)
            (hCharta :
              ∀ a, BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt
                hd OS lgc n i hi (Va a) (x0a a)),
            (∀ a, HasCompactSupport (ψa a : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ)) ∧
            (∀ a,
              tsupport (ψa a : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) ⊆
                (hCharta a).V0) ∧
	            (∀ u, (∑ a, ψa a u) = ψ u) ∧
	        (∀ a, BHW.Figure24LocalChartInput
	          (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi (Va a) (x0a a)) := by
	        classical
	        let Poriented :=
	          BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch_with_orientedPath
	            (d := d) hd i hi
	        let P := Poriented.toCanonical
	        have hψ_suppP :
	            tsupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) ⊆ P.V := by
	          simpa [BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
	            (d := d) hd n i hi] using hψ_supp
	        let K : Set (NPointDomain d n) :=
	          tsupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ)
	        let β := {x : NPointDomain d n // x ∈ K}
	        let center : β -> NPointDomain d n := fun b => b.1
	        have hcenter_mem : ∀ b : β, center b ∈ P.V := by
	          intro b
	          exact hψ_suppP b.2
	        let chart : ∀ b : β,
	            BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt
	              hd OS lgc n i hi P.V (center b) :=
	          fun b =>
	            BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_at
	              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi P.V
	              P.V_open P.V_jost P.V_ordered P.V_swap_ordered
	              P.adjLift_mem_extendedTube (x0 := center b)
	              (hcenter_mem b)
	        -- Each local chart is first shrunk to a bounded ball inside its
	        -- `V0`; the boundedness hypothesis is exactly what the existing SCV
	        -- finite Schwartz partition theorem requires.
	        choose r hr_pos hr_closed using
	          fun b : β =>
	            SCV.exists_pos_closedBall_subset_of_isOpen
	              (V := (chart b).V0) (chart b).V0_open
	              (chart b).x0_mem
	        let Uβ : β -> Set (NPointDomain d n) := fun b =>
	          Metric.ball (center b) (r b / 2)
	        have hUβ_open : ∀ b, IsOpen (Uβ b) := by
	          intro b
	          exact isOpen_ball
	        have hUβ_sub_chart : ∀ b, Uβ b ⊆ (chart b).V0 := by
	          intro b y hy
	          exact hr_closed b
	            ((Metric.closedBall_subset_closedBall
	              (by linarith [hr_pos b]))
	              (Metric.ball_subset_closedBall hy))
	        have hcover : K ⊆ ⋃ b : β, Uβ b := by
	          intro x hx
	          refine Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨⟨x, hx⟩, ?_⟩
	          simp [Uβ, center, hr_pos]
	        obtain ⟨t, htcover⟩ :=
	          hψ_comp.elim_finite_subcover Uβ hUβ_open hcover
	        let A := {b : β // b ∈ t}
	        letI : Fintype A := inferInstance
	        let Uα : A -> Set (NPointDomain d n) := fun a => Uβ a.1
	        have hUα_open : ∀ a, IsOpen (Uα a) := fun a => hUβ_open a.1
	        have hUα_relcompact :
	            ∀ a, ∃ c R, Uα a ⊆ Metric.closedBall c R := by
	          intro a
	          exact ⟨center a.1, r a.1 / 2,
	            fun y hy => Metric.ball_subset_closedBall hy⟩
	        have hK_coverα : K ⊆ ⋃ a : A, Uα a := by
	          intro x hx
	          rcases Set.mem_iUnion₂.mp (htcover hx) with ⟨b, hb, hxb⟩
	          exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨⟨b, hb⟩, hxb⟩
	        obtain ⟨χ, hχ_comp, hχ_supp, hχ_part⟩ :=
	          SCV.exists_finite_schwartz_partitionOfUnity_on_compact
	            (K := K) hψ_comp hUα_open hUα_relcompact hK_coverα
	        let ψa : A -> SchwartzNPoint d n := fun a =>
	          SchwartzMap.smulLeftCLM ℂ
	            (χ a : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) ψ
	        let Va : A -> Set (NPointDomain d n) := fun _ => P.V
	        let x0a : A -> NPointDomain d n := fun a => center a.1
	        let hCharta :
	            ∀ a, BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt
	              hd OS lgc n i hi (Va a) (x0a a) := by
	          intro a
	          simpa [Va, x0a, center] using chart a.1
	        refine ⟨A, inferInstance, ψa, Va, x0a, hCharta, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
	        · intro a
	          rw [HasCompactSupport]
	          exact IsCompact.of_isClosed_subset (hχ_comp a)
	            (isClosed_tsupport _)
	            (by
	              intro x hx
	              exact
	                (SchwartzMap.tsupport_smulLeftCLM_subset
	                  (F := ℂ) (g := (χ a : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ))
	                  (f := ψ) hx).2)
	        · intro a
	          have hloc :
	              SCV.SupportsInOpen
	                (ψa a : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) (Uα a) := by
	            simpa [ψa] using
	              SCV.supportsInOpen_partition_mul_left
	                (χ := χ a) (φ := ψ)
	                (U := Uα a) (V := Set.univ)
	                (hχ_supp a)
	                (⟨hψ_comp, subset_univ _⟩ :
	                  SCV.SupportsInOpen
	                    (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) Set.univ)
	          exact hloc.2.trans (by
	            simpa [Uα, hCharta, Va, x0a] using hUβ_sub_chart a.1)
	        · have hψ_sum :
	              ψ = ∑ a : A, ψa a := by
	            simpa [ψa] using
	              SCV.schwartzMap_eq_finset_sum_smulLeftCLM_of_sum_eq_one_on_tsupport
	                (Finset.univ : Finset A) χ ψ
	                (by simpa [K] using hχ_part)
	          intro u
	          exact congrFun (congrArg DFunLike.coe hψ_sum.symm) u
	        · intro a
	          exact
	            { V_open := P.V_open
	              V_sourcePatch := by
	                intro x hx
	                simpa [Va, P,
	                  BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
	                    (d := d) hd n i hi] using hx
	              V_jost := P.V_jost
	              V_ET := P.V_ET
	              V_swapET := by simpa [P.τ] using P.V_swapET
	              V_ordered := P.V_ordered
	              V_swap_ordered := by simpa [P.τ] using P.V_swap_ordered
	              V_adjLift_ET := by simpa [P.τ] using P.adjLift_mem_extendedTube
	              V_orientedPath_closure := by
	                intro x hx
	                exact Poriented.orientedPath_closure x hx
	              x0_mem := hcenter_mem a.1 }

	      theorem BHW.continuousOn_sourcePatch_branch_extendF_on_sourceChart
	          [NeZero d]
	          (hd : 2 <= d)
	          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
	          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
	          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
	          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
	          {x0 : NPointDomain d n}
	          (hInput :
	            BHW.Figure24LocalChartInput
	              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V x0)
	          (hChart :
	            BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt hd OS lgc n i hi V x0)
	          (ρ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
	          (hρ :
	            ρ = (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) ∨
	            ρ = Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩) :
	          ContinuousOn
	            (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed (fun k => u (ρ k))))
	            hChart.V0 := by
	        have hF_holo :
	            DifferentiableOn ℂ (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	              (BHW.ForwardTube d n) := by
	          simpa [BHW_forwardTube_eq (d := d) (n := n)] using
	            bvt_F_holomorphic (d := d) OS lgc n
	        have hF_cinv :
	            ∀ (Λ : ComplexLorentzGroup d)
	              (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℂ),
	              z ∈ BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
	              BHW.complexLorentzAction Λ z ∈
	                BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
	              bvt_F OS lgc n (BHW.complexLorentzAction Λ z) =
	                bvt_F OS lgc n z := by
	          intro Λ z hz hΛz
	          exact bvt_F_complexLorentzInvariant_forwardTube
	            (d := d) OS lgc n Λ z
	            ((BHW_forwardTube_eq (d := d) (n := n)) ▸ hz)
	            ((BHW_forwardTube_eq (d := d) (n := n)) ▸ hΛz)
	        have hExtend_cont :
	            ContinuousOn (BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n))
	              (BHW.ExtendedTube d n) :=
	          (BHW.extendF_holomorphicOn n (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	            hF_holo hF_cinv).continuousOn
	        have hbranch_cont :
	            Continuous
	              (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
	                BHW.realEmbed (fun k => u (ρ k))) :=
	          BHW.continuous_realEmbedNPoint.comp
	            (BHW.continuous_permNPoint (d := d) (n := n) ρ)
	        refine hExtend_cont.comp hbranch_cont.continuousOn ?_
	        intro u hu
	        have huV : u ∈ V := hChart.V0_sub hu
	        rcases hρ with rfl | rfl
	        · simpa using hInput.V_ET u huV
	        · simpa using hInput.V_swapET u huV

	      Real-source integrability on a source chart is no longer a separate
	      production target.  The checked public helper
	      `BHW.integrable_extendF_realSource_mul_schwartz_of_ET` is applied
	      directly to `hChart.V0`; its only chart-specific input is the
	      ordinary or swapped extended-tube membership transported along
	      `hChart.V0_sub`.

	      theorem BHW.integral_sourcePatch_branch_eq_of_finite_schwartz_sum
	          [NeZero d]
	          (hd : 2 <= d)
	          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
	          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
	          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
	          {A : Type} [Fintype A]
	          (ψ : SchwartzNPoint d n)
	          (ψa : A -> SchwartzNPoint d n)
	          (hψ_comp :
	            HasCompactSupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ))
	          (hψa_comp :
	            ∀ a, HasCompactSupport (ψa a : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ))
	          (hleft_int :
	            ∀ a, Integrable
	              (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψa a u))
	          (hright_int :
	            ∀ a, Integrable
	              (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed
	                    (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) *
	                  ψa a u))
	          (hsum : ∀ u, (∑ a, ψa a u) = ψ u)
	          (hlocal :
	            ∀ a,
	              ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                  BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                    (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψa a u
	                =
	              ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                  BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                    (BHW.realEmbed
	                      (fun k => u
	                        (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) *
	                    ψa a u) :
	          ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψ u
	            =
	          ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed
	                  (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) *
	                ψ u := by
	        -- Finite linearity of the Lebesgue integral after rewriting
	        -- `ψ` by `hsum`.  Integrability is supplied by compact support of
	        -- `ψ` and each `ψa a`, continuity of `extendF` on the ordinary
	        -- and swapped extended-tube source-patch images, and the support
	        -- containment in each local chart.
	        have hleft_sum :
	            ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψ u
	              =
	            ∑ a,
	              ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψa a u := by
	          rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_finset_sum
	            (f := fun a u =>
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψa a u)
	            (by intro a _; exact hleft_int a)]
	          apply MeasureTheory.integral_congr_ae
	          filter_upwards with u
	          simp [hsum u, Finset.mul_sum]
	        have hright_sum :
	            ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed
	                    (fun k => u
	                      (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) * ψ u
	              =
	            ∑ a,
	              ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed
	                    (fun k => u
	                      (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) * ψa a u := by
	          rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_finset_sum
	            (f := fun a u =>
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed
	                  (fun k => u
	                    (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) * ψa a u)
	            (by intro a _; exact hright_int a)]
	          apply MeasureTheory.integral_congr_ae
	          filter_upwards with u
	          simp [hsum u, Finset.mul_sum]
	        calc
	          ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψ u
	              = _ := hleft_sum
	          _ =
	            ∑ a,
	              ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed
	                    (fun k => u
	                      (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) * ψa a u := by
	                exact Finset.sum_congr rfl (by intro a _; exact hlocal a)
	          _ =
	            ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed
	                  (fun k => u
	                    (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) * ψ u :=
	                hright_sum.symm

	      theorem BHW.os45CanonicalSourcePatch_extendF_eq
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (ψ : SchwartzNPoint d n)
          (hψ_comp :
            HasCompactSupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ))
          (hψ_supp :
            tsupport (ψ : NPointDomain d n -> ℂ) ⊆
              BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi) :
          ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψ u
            =
          ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) *
                ψ u
            := by
	        obtain ⟨A, hA, ψa, Va, x0a, hCharta,
	          hψa_comp, hψa_supp, hsum, hInputs⟩ :=
	          BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_compactSupport_chartPartition
	            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi ψ hψ_comp hψ_supp
	        classical
	        letI := hA
	        have hlocal :
	            ∀ a,
              ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
                  BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                    (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψa a u
                =
              ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
                  BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                    (BHW.realEmbed
                      (fun k => u
                        (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) *
                    ψa a u := by
          intro a
          exact
            BHW.os45CanonicalSourcePatch_extendF_eq_local
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi (Va a)
              (hInputs a).V_open (hInputs a).V_jost
              (hInputs a).V_ET (hInputs a).V_swapET
              (hInputs a).V_ordered (hInputs a).V_swap_ordered
	              (hInputs a).V_adjLift_ET (hInputs a).V_sourcePatch
              (hInputs a).x0_mem
	              (hCharta a)
              (fun x hx =>
                (hInputs a).V_orientedPath_closure x
                  (BHW.closure_sourceChart_sub_closure_input
                    (hCharta a) hx))
              (ψa a) (hψa_comp a) (hψa_supp a)
	        have hleft_int :
	            ∀ a, Integrable
	              (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψa a u) := by
	          intro a
	          exact
	            BHW.integrable_extendF_realSource_mul_schwartz_of_ET
	              (d := d) OS lgc n (hCharta a).V0
	              (hCharta a).V0_open (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
	              (by
	                intro u hu
	                exact (hInputs a).V_ET u ((hCharta a).V0_sub hu))
	              (ψa a) (hψa_comp a) (hψa_supp a)
	        have hright_int :
	            ∀ a, Integrable
	              (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed
	                    (fun k => u
	                      (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) *
	                  ψa a u) := by
	          intro a
	          exact
	            BHW.integrable_extendF_realSource_mul_schwartz_of_ET
	              (d := d) OS lgc n (hCharta a).V0
	              (hCharta a).V0_open
	              (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩)
	              (by
	                intro u hu
	                exact (hInputs a).V_swapET u ((hCharta a).V0_sub hu))
	              (ψa a) (hψa_comp a) (hψa_supp a)
	        exact
	          BHW.integral_sourcePatch_branch_eq_of_finite_schwartz_sum
	            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi ψ ψa
	            hψ_comp hψa_comp hleft_int hright_int hsum hlocal

      theorem BHW.os45CompactFigure24_branchEq_on_realPatch
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          ∀ (φ : SchwartzMap (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ) ℂ),
            HasCompactSupport
              (φ : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ) -> ℂ) ->
            tsupport
              (φ : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ) -> ℂ) ⊆
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch (d := d) n i hi π ->
            ∫ x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ,
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (π k)) * φ x
              =
            ∫ x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ,
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x
                    ((π * Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩) k)) *
                  φ x := by
        intro φ hφ_comp hφ_supp
        obtain ⟨ψ, hψ_comp, hψ_supp, hψ_def,
          hleft_pullback, hright_pullback⟩ :=
          BHW.os45CompactRealPatch_pullbackSchwartz
            (d := d) (n := n) OS lgc i hi π φ hφ_comp hφ_supp
        have hcanonical :
            ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (BHW.realEmbed u) * ψ u
              =
            ∫ u : NPointDomain d n,
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (BHW.realEmbed
                    (fun k => u
                      (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩ k))) *
                  ψ u := by
          exact
            BHW.os45CanonicalSourcePatch_extendF_eq
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi ψ hψ_comp hψ_supp
        exact hleft_pullback.trans (hcanonical.trans hright_pullback.symm)

      noncomputable def BHW.os45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq_of_OSI45
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
            (d := d) n i hi OS lgc := by
        exact
          { realPatch := BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch (d := d) n i hi
            realPatch_open :=
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_open (d := d) n i hi
            realPatch_nonempty :=
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_nonempty
                (d := d) hd n i hi
            realPatch_jost :=
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_jost
                (d := d) hd n i hi
            realPatch_left_sector :=
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_left_sector
                (d := d) hd n i hi
            realPatch_right_sector :=
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_right_sector
                (d := d) hd n i hi
            realPatch_commonEdge_contact :=
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_commonEdge_contact
                (d := d) hd n i hi
            compact_branch_eq :=
              BHW.os45CompactFigure24_branchEq_on_realPatch
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi }

      structure BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℂ) -> ℂ}
          (hRep : BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
            (d := d) n F) where
        τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)
        τ_eq : τ = Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩
        V : Set (NPointDomain d n)
        V_open : IsOpen V
        V_nonempty : V.Nonempty
        Wseed : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
        Wseed_relOpen :
          BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n Wseed
        Wseed_nonempty : Wseed.Nonempty
        Wscal : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
        Wscal_relOpen :
          BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n Wscal
        Wscal_connected : IsConnected Wscal
        Wseed_subset : Wseed ⊆ Wscal
        Wscal_double :
          Wscal ⊆ BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n τ
        Wscal_component :
          ∃ Gbase ∈ Wscal,
            Wscal =
              connectedComponentIn
                (BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n τ) Gbase
        seed_eq :
          Set.EqOn
            (fun G =>
              hRep.Phi (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n τ G))
            hRep.Phi
            Wseed
        wick_mem :
          ∀ x ∈ V,
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                    (d := d) (n := n)
                    (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) ∈ Wscal

      structure BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSeedFigure24Path
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℂ) -> ℂ}
          (hRep : BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
            (d := d) n F) where
        seed : BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed
          (d := d) n i hi hRep
        path_to_quarterTurn :
          ∀ x ∈ closure seed.V,
            BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x
        quarterTurn_mem_closure :
          ∀ x ∈ closure seed.V,
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                    (d := d) (n := n)
                    (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) ∈ seed.Wscal
        corridor_eq :
          Set.EqOn
            (fun G =>
              hRep.Phi
                (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n seed.τ G))
            hRep.Phi
            seed.Wscal

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n)) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
            (d := d) n i hi hRep

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSourceEq_of_compactWickPairingEq
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n))
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
              (d := d) n i hi hRep)
          (hCompact :
            BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
              (d := d) n i hi OS lgc) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSourceEq
            (d := d) n i hi hRep hChart := by
        let hRealSeed :=
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedRealSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
        exact
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSourceEq_of_realSeed
            (d := d) hd n i hi hRep hChart hRealSeed

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n))
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
              (d := d) n i hi hRep)
          (hCompact :
            BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
              (d := d) n i hi OS lgc) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed
            (d := d) n i hi hRep := by
        let hRealSeed :=
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedRealSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
        exact
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_realSeed
            (d := d) hd n i hi hRep hChart hRealSeed

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSeedFigure24Path
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n))
          (hSeed :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed
              (d := d) n i hi hRep)
          (hOrientedPath :
            ∀ x ∈ closure hSeed.V,
              BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField
                (d := d) n i hi x)
          (hQuarterTurn_mem_closure :
            ∀ x ∈ closure hSeed.V,
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                  (BHW.realEmbed
                    (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                      (d := d) (n := n)
                      (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) ∈ hSeed.Wscal) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSeedFigure24Path
            (d := d) n i hi hRep := by
        classical
        refine
          { seed := hSeed
            path_to_quarterTurn := hOrientedPath
            quarterTurn_mem_closure := hQuarterTurn_mem_closure
            corridor_eq := ?_ }
        have hDouble_swap :
            hSeed.Wscal ⊆
              BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n
                (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩) := by
          simpa [hSeed.τ_eq] using hSeed.Wscal_double
        have hSeed_swap :
            let τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
              Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩
            Set.EqOn
              (fun G =>
                hRep.Phi (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n τ G))
              hRep.Phi
              hSeed.Wseed := by
          simpa [hSeed.τ_eq] using hSeed.seed_eq
        have hCorridor_swap :
            let τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
              Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩
            Set.EqOn
              (fun G =>
                hRep.Phi (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n τ G))
              hRep.Phi
              hSeed.Wscal :=
          BHW.os45AdjacentOrientedScalarEq_on_quarterTurnCorridor
            (d := d) hd n i hi hRep
            hSeed.Wseed hSeed.Wscal
            hSeed.Wscal_relOpen hSeed.Wscal_connected
            hSeed.Wseed_relOpen hSeed.Wseed_nonempty
            hSeed.Wseed_subset hDouble_swap hSeed_swap
        intro G hG
        have hGcorr := hCorridor_swap G hG
        simpa [hSeed.τ_eq] using hGcorr

      noncomputable def BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed.restrict_sourcePatch
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℂ) -> ℂ}
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n F)
          (hSeed :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed
              (d := d) n i hi hRep)
          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
          (hV_open : IsOpen V)
          (hV_nonempty : V.Nonempty)
          (hV_sub : V ⊆ hSeed.V) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed
            (d := d) n i hi hRep :=
        { τ := hSeed.τ
          τ_eq := hSeed.τ_eq
          V := V
          V_open := hV_open
          V_nonempty := hV_nonempty
          Wseed := hSeed.Wseed
          Wseed_relOpen := hSeed.Wseed_relOpen
          Wseed_nonempty := hSeed.Wseed_nonempty
          Wscal := hSeed.Wscal
          Wscal_relOpen := hSeed.Wscal_relOpen
          Wscal_connected := hSeed.Wscal_connected
          Wseed_subset := hSeed.Wseed_subset
          Wscal_double := hSeed.Wscal_double
          Wscal_component := hSeed.Wscal_component
          seed_eq := hSeed.seed_eq
          wick_mem := by
            intro x hx
            exact hSeed.wick_mem x (hV_sub hx) }

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSeedFigure24Path_of_compactWickPairingEq
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n))
          (hCompact :
            BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
              (d := d) n i hi OS lgc)
          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
          (hV_open : IsOpen V)
          (hV_nonempty : V.Nonempty)
          (hV_sub :
            let hChart :=
              BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep
            let hSeed :=
              BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
            V ⊆ hSeed.V)
          (hQuarterTurn_mem_closure :
            let hChart :=
              BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep
            let hSeed :=
              BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
            ∀ x ∈ closure V,
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                  (BHW.realEmbed
                    (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                      (d := d) (n := n)
                      (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) ∈ hSeed.Wscal)
          (hOrientedPath :
            ∀ x ∈ closure V,
              BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField
                (d := d) n i hi x) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSeedFigure24Path
            (d := d) n i hi hRep := by
        let hChart :=
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep
        let hSeed0 :=
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
        let hSeed :=
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed.restrict_sourcePatch
            (d := d) hd n i hi hRep hSeed0
            V hV_open hV_nonempty
            (by simpa [hChart, hSeed0] using hV_sub)
        have hPath :
            ∀ x ∈ closure hSeed.V,
              BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField
                (d := d) n i hi x := by
          intro x hx
          exact hOrientedPath x (by simpa [hSeed] using hx)
        have hQuarterTurn :
            ∀ x ∈ closure hSeed.V,
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                  (BHW.realEmbed
                    (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                      (d := d) (n := n)
                      (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) ∈ hSeed.Wscal := by
          intro x hx
          have hmem0 :
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                  (BHW.realEmbed
                    (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                      (d := d) (n := n)
                      (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) ∈ hSeed0.Wscal := by
            exact
              (by
                simpa [hChart, hSeed0] using hQuarterTurn_mem_closure)
                x (by simpa [hSeed] using hx)
          simpa [hSeed] using hmem0
        exact
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSeedFigure24Path
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hSeed hPath hQuarterTurn
      ```

      The `hQuarterTurn_mem_closure` input in the last display is
      intentional.  It is **not** a hidden assumption that `closure V` lies in
      the open seed patch.  For the canonical Figure-2-4 source patch this
      would be the wrong topology.  The required theorem is the oriented
      corridor-membership statement:

      ```lean
      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedQuarterTurnMem_closure_of_figure24Path
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n))
          (hCompact :
            BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
              (d := d) n i hi OS lgc)
          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
          (hV_open : IsOpen V)
          (hV_nonempty : V.Nonempty)
          (hV_connected : IsConnected V)
          (hV_sub :
            let hChart :=
              BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep
            let hSeed :=
              BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
            V ⊆ hSeed.V)
          (hOrientedPath :
            ∀ x ∈ closure V,
              BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField
                (d := d) n i hi x) :
          let hChart :=
            BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep
          let hSeed :=
            BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
          ∀ x ∈ closure V,
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                    (d := d) (n := n)
                    (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) ∈ hSeed.Wscal
      ```

      Its proof is the oriented version of the checked
      `BHW.os45AdjacentQuarterTurnScalarCorridor_of_figure24` membership
      argument, but the closure step needs one extra component field and one
      real-topology hypothesis.  The theorem must not infer membership of a
      limit point from relative openness of `hSeed.Wscal`; instead
      `hSeed.Wscal` records that it is the connected component of the
      oriented adjacent double domain selected by the `S'_n` seed, and the
      local patch `V` is connected.  For each `x ∈ closure V`, the oriented
      Figure-2-4 path proves that the quarter-turn scalar

      ```lean
      q x :=
        BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
          ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
            (BHW.realEmbed
              (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                (d := d) (n := n)
                (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x)))
      ```

      lies in the oriented double domain.  Since `q` is continuous and
      `closure V` is connected, `q '' closure V` is connected.  It intersects
      `hSeed.Wscal` at any point of `V`, by the already proved source-patch
      field `hSeed.wick_mem` and the inclusion `V ⊆ hSeed.V`.  Therefore
      `q '' closure V` is contained in the same connected component of the
      double domain as `hSeed.Wscal`, and the stored component identity gives
      the desired endpoint membership.  This proof uses only the BHW/Jost
      source corridor and the oriented Figure-2-4 path; it does not use local
      EOW, final locality, PET independence, or any closure-in-open shortcut.

      The finite/topological support needed by the proof is:

      ```lean
      theorem BHW.continuous_os45QuarterTurnOrientedScalar
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) :
          Continuous
            (fun x : NPointDomain d n =>
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                  (BHW.realEmbed
                    (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                      (d := d) (n := n)
                      (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x)))) := by
        exact
          (BHW.continuous_sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n).comp
            ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm.continuous.comp
              ((BHW.continuous_realEmbedNPoint (d := d) (n := n)).comp
                (BHW.continuous_os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                  (d := d) (n := n) (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)))))

      theorem BHW.os45QuarterTurnOrientedScalar_mem_double_of_orientedPath
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {x : NPointDomain d n}
          (hPath :
            BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x) :
          let τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
            Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩
          BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
            ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
              (BHW.realEmbed
                (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                  (d := d) (n := n)
                  (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) ∈
            BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n τ := by
        classical
        let τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) := Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩
        let Q := BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)
        let y :=
          BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint (d := d) (n := n)
            (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x
        rcases hPath with
          ⟨Γ, Δ, hΓ_cont, hΔ_cont, hΓ0, hΓ1, hΓ_ET, hΔ_ET, hΔ_oriented⟩
        let q : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n (Q.symm (BHW.realEmbed y))
        have hleft :
            q ∈ BHW.sourceOrientedExtendedTubeDomain d n := by
          refine ⟨Γ (1 : unitInterval), hΓ_ET (1 : unitInterval), ?_⟩
          simpa [q, Q, y] using (congrArg
            (BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n) hΓ1).symm
        have hright :
            BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n τ q ∈
              BHW.sourceOrientedExtendedTubeDomain d n := by
          refine ⟨Δ (1 : unitInterval), hΔ_ET (1 : unitInterval), ?_⟩
          have hΔ1 := hΔ_oriented (1 : unitInterval)
          simpa [q, Q, y, hΓ1] using hΔ1.symm
        exact ⟨hleft, hright⟩

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedQuarterTurnMem_closure_of_figure24Path
          ... := by
        classical
        let τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) := Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩
        let Q := BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)
        let hChart :=
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep
        let hSeed :=
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
        let D : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n hSeed.τ
        let q : NPointDomain d n -> BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n :=
          fun x =>
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              (Q.symm
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                    (d := d) (n := n)
                    (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x)))
        have hq_cont : Continuous q := by
          simpa [q, Q] using
            BHW.continuous_os45QuarterTurnOrientedScalar
              (d := d) (n := n)
        have hqD : ∀ x ∈ closure V, q x ∈ D := by
          intro x hx
          have hxDswap :=
            BHW.os45QuarterTurnOrientedScalar_mem_double_of_orientedPath
              (d := d) hd n i hi (hOrientedPath x hx)
          simpa [D, q, Q, hSeed.τ_eq] using hxDswap
        rcases hSeed.Wscal_component with ⟨Gbase, hGbaseW, hWcomp⟩
        rcases hV_nonempty with ⟨xbase, hxbaseV⟩
        have hxbase_closure : xbase ∈ closure V := subset_closure hxbaseV
        have hqbaseW : q xbase ∈ hSeed.Wscal := by
          have hmem :
              q xbase ∈ hSeed.Wscal := by
            simpa [hChart, hSeed, q, Q] using
              hSeed.wick_mem xbase ((by
                simpa [hChart, hSeed] using hV_sub) hxbaseV)
          exact hmem
        have hImage_conn : IsConnected (q '' closure V) :=
          hV_connected.closure.image q hq_cont.continuousOn
        have hImage_D : q '' closure V ⊆ D := by
          intro G hG
          rcases hG with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
          exact hqD x hx
        have hqbase_image : q xbase ∈ q '' closure V :=
          ⟨xbase, hxbase_closure, rfl⟩
        have hImage_component :
            q '' closure V ⊆ connectedComponentIn D (q xbase) :=
          hImage_conn.isPreconnected.subset_connectedComponentIn
            hqbase_image hImage_D
        have hcomponent_eq :
            connectedComponentIn D (q xbase) = hSeed.Wscal := by
          have hqbase_component :
              q xbase ∈ connectedComponentIn D Gbase := by
            simpa [hWcomp] using hqbaseW
          have hcomp :=
            connectedComponentIn_eq (F := D) (x := Gbase)
              (y := q xbase) hqbase_component
          simpa [hWcomp] using hcomp.symm
        intro x hx
        have hxComp : q x ∈ connectedComponentIn D (q xbase) :=
          hImage_component ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
        simpa [q, Q, hChart, hSeed, hcomponent_eq] using hxComp
      ```

      These oriented names are not optional aliases.  They are the only
      compatible consumers for `SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData`.
      Their proof scripts are the pure-Gram scripts with three substitutions:
      replace every `sourceMinkowskiGram` value by
      `sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant`, replace every
      `sourcePermuteComplexGram` map by `sourcePermuteOrientedGram`, and
      replace the checked pure-Gram path field by
      `OS45Figure24OrientedPathField`.  The non-mechanical obligations are
      exactly the oriented identity principle, the oriented real uniqueness
      set from compact Wick pairings, and the source-oriented path field
      described above.

      Implementation-order correction for the oriented adjacent packet.  The
      theorem `os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSourceEq_of_compactWickPairingEq`
      is a final orchestration theorem, not the first mathematical proof in
      the packet.  The compact OS-I equality first produces a real-patch
      seed, then the generic oriented corridor theorem propagates that seed
      across `Wscal`.  Production Lean must keep these as separate proof
      objects so the Figure-2-4 path theorem can still see the seed
      provenance.  In the production file order, the real-seed definitions
      and `*_of_realSeed` theorems below must appear before the public
      `*_of_compactWickPairingEq` wrappers displayed above; the wrappers are
      shown earlier only to record the public endpoint names.

      ```lean
      structure BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedRealSeed
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℂ) -> ℂ}
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n F)
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
              (d := d) n i hi hRep) where
        τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)
        τ_eq : τ = hChart.τ
        realPatch : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ)
        realPatch_open : IsOpen realPatch
        realPatch_nonempty : realPatch.Nonempty
        realPatch_unique :
          BHW.sourceOrientedDistributionalUniquenessPatch d n realPatch
        Wseed : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
        Wseed_relOpen :
          BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n Wseed
        Wseed_connected : IsConnected Wseed
        Wseed_nonempty : Wseed.Nonempty
        realPatch_mem_Wseed :
          ∀ x ∈ realPatch,
            BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x ∈ Wseed
        Wseed_subset_Wscal : Wseed ⊆ hChart.Wscal
        Wseed_double :
          Wseed ⊆ BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n τ
        seed_eq :
          Set.EqOn
            (fun G => hRep.Phi (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n τ G))
            hRep.Phi
            Wseed
        wick_mem :
          ∀ x ∈ BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi,
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                    (d := d) (n := n)
                    (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) ∈ hChart.Wscal

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24_checkedRealPatch_of_anchor
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℂ) -> ℂ}
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hAnchor :
            BHW.SourceOrientedDistributionalAdjacentTubeAnchor
              (d := d) n i hi F)
          (π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch
            (d := d) n π i hi (hAnchor.realPatch π)

      theorem BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch.restrict_open
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {E0 E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ)}
          (hPatch :
            BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch (d := d) n π i hi E0)
          (hE_sub : E ⊆ E0)
          (hE_open : IsOpen E)
          (hE_ne : E.Nonempty)
          (hGramEnv_restrict :
            BHW.IsHWRealEnvironment d n
              (BHW.sourceRealMinkowskiGram d n ''
                {y | ∃ x ∈ E, y = fun k => x (π k)})) :
          BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch (d := d) n π i hi E := by
        refine
          { open := hE_open
            nonempty := hE_ne
            permuted_jost := ?_
            gramEnvironment_permuted := hGramEnv_restrict }
        intro y hy
        rcases hy with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
        exact hPatch.permuted_jost ⟨x, hE_sub hx, rfl⟩

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24_checkedRealPatch_chartContact
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℂ) -> ℂ}
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n F)
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
              (d := d) n i hi hRep)
          (hAnchor :
            BHW.SourceOrientedDistributionalAdjacentTubeAnchor
              (d := d) n i hi F)
          (π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          ∃ x0 ∈ hAnchor.realPatch π,
            BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              (fun k => x0 (π k)) ∈ hChart.Wscal := by
        obtain ⟨x0, hx0Patch, u, hu, hreal_eq⟩ :=
          hAnchor.realPatch_commonEdge_contact π
        refine ⟨x0, hx0Patch, ?_⟩
        have hcommon := hChart.commonEdge_mem u hu
        simpa [hreal_eq] using hcommon

      theorem BHW.continuous_realSourcePermute_orientedInvariant
          (d n : Nat)
          (π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          Continuous
            (fun x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ =>
              BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                (fun k => x (π k))) := by
        exact
          BHW.continuous_sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n |>.comp
            (BHW.realSourcePermuteHomeomorph d n π).continuous

      theorem BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch.restrict_orientedOpen
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {E0 : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ)}
          (hPatch :
            BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch (d := d) n π i hi E0)
          {W0 : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          (hW0_open : IsOpen W0)
          (hNonempty :
            (E0 ∩
              {x |
                BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                  (fun k => x (π k)) ∈ W0}).Nonempty) :
          BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch (d := d) n π i hi
            (E0 ∩
              {x |
                BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                  (fun k => x (π k)) ∈ W0})

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24_checkedRealPatch_shrink_into_orientedRelOpen
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (E0 : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ))
          (hPatch :
            BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch (d := d) n π i hi E0)
          {W : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          (hW_rel :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n W)
          (hContact :
            ∃ x0 ∈ E0,
              BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                (fun k => x0 (π k)) ∈ W) :
          ∃ E1 : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ),
            E1 ⊆ E0 ∧
            IsOpen E1 ∧
            E1.Nonempty ∧
            BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch (d := d) n π i hi E1 ∧
            (∀ y ∈ {y | ∃ x ∈ E1, y = fun k => x (π k)},
              BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n y ∈ W) := by
        rcases hW_rel with ⟨W0, hW0_open, hW_eq⟩
        rcases hContact with ⟨x0, hx0E0, hx0W⟩
        let E1 : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ) :=
          E0 ∩
            {x |
              BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                (fun k => x (π k)) ∈ W0}
        have hE1_sub : E1 ⊆ E0 := by
          intro x hx
          exact hx.1
        have hE1_open : IsOpen E1 := by
          exact hPatch.open.inter
            (hW0_open.preimage
              (BHW.continuous_realSourcePermute_orientedInvariant d n π))
        have hx0W0 :
            BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              (fun k => x0 (π k)) ∈ W0 := by
          have hx0W' :
              BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                (fun k => x0 (π k)) ∈
                  W0 ∩ BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n := by
            simpa [hW_eq] using hx0W
          exact hx0W'.1
        have hE1_ne : E1.Nonempty :=
          ⟨x0, hx0E0, hx0W0⟩
        have hChecked1 :
            BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch (d := d) n π i hi E1 :=
          BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch.restrict_orientedOpen
            (d := d) hd n π i hi hPatch hW0_open hE1_ne
        refine ⟨E1, hE1_sub, hE1_open, hE1_ne, hChecked1, ?_⟩
        intro y hy
        rcases hy with ⟨x, hxE1, rfl⟩
        rw [hW_eq]
        exact
          ⟨hxE1.2,
            BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant_mem_variety d n
              (fun k => x (π k))⟩

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24_realPatch_orientedRegularChartSubpatch
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℂ) -> ℂ}
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n F)
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
              (d := d) n i hi hRep)
          (hAnchor :
            BHW.SourceOrientedDistributionalAdjacentTubeAnchor
              (d := d) n i hi F)
          (π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          ∃ E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ),
            E ⊆ hAnchor.realPatch π ∧
            IsOpen E ∧
            E.Nonempty ∧
            BHW.IsHWOrientedRealEnvironment d n
              {y | ∃ x ∈ E, y = fun k => x (π k)} ∧
            (∀ y ∈ {y | ∃ x ∈ E, y = fun k => x (π k)},
              BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n y ∈
                hChart.Wscal) := by
        have hChecked :
            BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch
              (d := d) n π i hi (hAnchor.realPatch π) :=
          BHW.os45Figure24_checkedRealPatch_of_anchor
            (d := d) hd n i hi hAnchor π
        obtain ⟨x0, hx0Patch, hx0W⟩ :=
          BHW.os45Figure24_checkedRealPatch_chartContact
            (d := d) hd n i hi hRep hChart hAnchor π
        obtain ⟨E1, hE1_sub, hE1_open, hE1_ne, hChecked1,
          hE1_W⟩ :=
          BHW.os45Figure24_checkedRealPatch_shrink_into_orientedRelOpen
            (d := d) hd n π i hi (hAnchor.realPatch π)
            hChecked hChart.Wscal_relOpen
            ⟨x0, hx0Patch, hx0W⟩
        obtain ⟨E, hE_sub_E1, hE_open, hE_ne, hE_env⟩ :=
          BHW.os45Figure24_realPatch_orientedRegularSubpatch
            (d := d) hd n π i hi E1 hChecked1
        refine
          ⟨E, subset_trans hE_sub_E1 hE1_sub, hE_open, hE_ne,
            hE_env, ?_⟩
        intro y hy
        rcases hy with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
        exact hE1_W (fun k => x (π k))
          ⟨x, hE_sub_E1 hx, rfl⟩

      theorem BHW.os45_realPatch_subset_anchorPatch
          (d n : Nat)
          {E0 E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ)}
          (hE_sub : E ⊆ E0)
          {π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)}
          {y : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ}
          (hy : y ∈ {y | ∃ x ∈ E, y = fun k => x (π k)}) :
          y ∈ {y | ∃ x ∈ E0, y = fun k => x (π k)} := by
        rcases hy with ⟨x, hxE, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨x, hE_sub hxE, rfl⟩

      theorem BHW.os45_oriented_seedNeighborhood_from_realPatch
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℂ) -> ℂ}
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n F)
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
              (d := d) n i hi hRep)
          (hAnchor :
            BHW.SourceOrientedDistributionalAdjacentTubeAnchor
              (d := d) n i hi F)
          (π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          (E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ))
          (hE_sub : E ⊆ hAnchor.realPatch π)
          (hE_env :
            BHW.IsHWOrientedRealEnvironment d n
              {y | ∃ x ∈ E, y = fun k => x (π k)})
          (hE_chart :
            ∀ y ∈ {y | ∃ x ∈ E, y = fun k => x (π k)},
              BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n y ∈
                hChart.Wscal) :
          ∃ Wseed : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n),
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n Wseed ∧
            IsConnected Wseed ∧
            Wseed.Nonempty ∧
            (∀ y ∈ {y | ∃ x ∈ E, y = fun k => x (π k)},
              BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n y ∈ Wseed) ∧
            Wseed ⊆ hChart.Wscal ∧
            Wseed ⊆
              BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n hChart.τ := by
        refine
          ⟨hChart.Wscal, hChart.Wscal_relOpen, hChart.Wscal_connected,
            ?_, hE_chart, subset_rfl, hChart.Wscal_double⟩
        rcases hE_env.nonempty with ⟨y0, hy0⟩
        exact
          ⟨BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n y0,
            hE_chart y0 hy0⟩

      theorem BHW.sourceRealOrientedInvariant_left_mem_double_of_sectors
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          (x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ)
          (hleft :
            BHW.realEmbed x ∈ BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n π)
          (hright :
            BHW.realEmbed x ∈
              BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n
                (π * Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩)) :
          BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
            (fun k => x (π k)) ∈
            BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n
              (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩)

      theorem BHW.sourceRealOrientedInvariant_adjacent_perm_eq
          (d n : Nat)
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          (x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ℝ) :
          BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
            (fun k => x ((π * Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩) k)) =
          BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n
            (Equiv.swap i ⟨i.val + 1, hi⟩)
            (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              (fun k => x (π k)))

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedAdjacentTubeAnchor_of_compactWickPairingEq
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hCompact :
            BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
              (d := d) n i hi OS lgc) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedDistributionalAdjacentTubeAnchor
            (d := d) n i hi (bvt_F OS lgc n) := by
        exact
          { realPatch := hCompact.realPatch
            realPatch_open := hCompact.realPatch_open
            realPatch_nonempty := hCompact.realPatch_nonempty
            realPatch_jost := hCompact.realPatch_jost
            realPatch_left_sector := hCompact.realPatch_left_sector
            realPatch_right_sector := hCompact.realPatch_right_sector
            realPatch_commonEdge_contact :=
              hCompact.realPatch_commonEdge_contact
            oriented_left_mem := by
              intro π x hx
              exact
                BHW.sourceRealOrientedInvariant_left_mem_double_of_sectors
                  (d := d) n i hi π x
                  (hCompact.realPatch_left_sector π x hx)
                  (hCompact.realPatch_right_sector π x hx)
            oriented_right_eq_perm_left := by
              intro π x hx
              exact
                BHW.sourceRealOrientedInvariant_adjacent_perm_eq
                  d n i hi π x
            compact_branch_eq := hCompact.compact_branch_eq }

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedRealSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n))
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
              (d := d) n i hi hRep)
          (hCompact :
            BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
              (d := d) n i hi OS lgc) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedRealSeed
            (d := d) n i hi hRep hChart := by
        let hAnchor :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedAdjacentTubeAnchor_of_compactWickPairingEq
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hCompact
        let π : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) := 1
        obtain ⟨E, hE_sub, hE_open, hE_ne, hE_env,
          hE_chart⟩ :=
          BHW.os45Figure24_realPatch_orientedRegularChartSubpatch
            (d := d) hd n i hi hRep hChart hAnchor π
      ```
